description: Letter from a husband to his wife after she bore him a daughter while he temporarily left her, waiting until her father gave the couple the twenty dinars he had promised them. The sender expresses his joy and his gratitude to God for the safe delivery by his wife. (Information from Mediterranean Society, V, pp. 218-219 and partial translation in Mediterranean Society, III, p. 228.) See also T-S NS 163.86 (PGPID 23740).
